name: Fighter of the Destiny
overview: At the beginning of time, a mystical meteor came crashing down from outer space and scattered all over the world. A piece of it landed in the Eastern Continent. There were mysterious totems carved upon the meteor, and people gathered around it wanting to discover its usage. They discovered the Way, and established The Tradition. Several thousand years later, the fourteen years old orphan Chen Chang Shang left his master to cure his illness and change his fate. He brought a piece of marriage vow with him to the capital, thus began the journey of a rising hero. The cartoon series is based on the novel Ze Tian Ji by Mao Ni and there is also a live action series called Fighter of the Destiny.

trailers.title: 『天択記』择天记  Fighter of the Destiny - Anime Japan 2018｜Adapted From Webnovel Fictions
